chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No. D-1206 of 2021 __________________________________________________________________ Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on Misc. No.5054/2021. 2. For order on office objection no.18. 3. For order on Misc. No.5055/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 13.04.2021 Mr. Faizan Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioners. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption application is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through this petition, the petitioners are seeking direction to the respondents to decide the fate of summary dated 20.03.2018 floated for approval of the Chief Minister Sindh, regarding up- gradation of “Laboratory Staff Posts of College Education Department, Government of Sindh”. The anxiety of the petitioners is that the decision on the aforesaid summary has not yet been made. Learned counsel, however, states that he will be satisfied if the decision on the aforesaid summary is made by the Competent Authority, so far as the up-gradation of their post is concerned. If this is the legal position of the case, let at the first instance, notice be issued to the respondents as well as to learned AAG for 18.05.2021 with direction to ascertain the fate of summary and place on record the copy of the order passed thereon by the Competent Authority on or before the next date of hearing. JUDGE JUDGE Nadir*
